concerns.text: Task T012 ('Implement code/stimuli/extract_metrics.py...') omits the explicit CPU-only constraint and YOLOv8n model requirement mandated by FR-001 and US-1 Acceptance Scenario 3. Without explicit instruction, the implementation may default to GPU paths or other models, violating the 'NO GPU' constitutional constraint and the 30s/2GB RAM performance SC.

Task T015 ('Implement code/stimuli/validate_sensitivity.py...') fails to specify the 'n=20' pilot study size required by SC-001. The task description only mentions a 'pilot set', which allows for a sample size that does not satisfy the success criterion's definition of 'avoiding circular validation'.

Task T027 ('Implement VIF calculation...') only mandates flagging instability if VIF > 5. It omits the mandatory fallback action required by FR-003 and US-3 Acceptance Scenario 4: 'either combines predictors via PCA or flags the instability'. The task must explicitly include the PCA implementation logic to satisfy the spec.

Task T032 ('Code cleanup... remove any GPU-specific code paths') defers the CPU-only constraint to the 'Polish' phase. FR-001 and the Plan's 'Constraints' section define CPU-only as a fundamental requirement for the entire pipeline. Deferring this to a cleanup pass risks the implementation of GPU-dependent code in earlier phases, violating the 'NO GPU' constraint during development.
